summary: Production deploy succeeded (https://iamsuri.ai/3d, dpl_EG3zrhvRrfb7ZmvaQJVscoZMTdbi). Screenshot captured from inside Product Room via dev-server + __worldStore teleport. Visible: 4-station row, hero glass case on back wall, ceiling cove, planks/baseboards/trim. NOTE: monitor labels render mirrored from the door-entry POV — stations may be facing +z (back wall) instead of -z (player on entry). This is a real OUT-1 bug worth a follow-up unit.

artifacts.summary: Inside Product Room from door entry POV showing stations + hero + shell

follow_up_recommendations: Stations appear to face +z (back wall) instead of -z (player). Verify by checking the rotation of the monitor mesh in PROJECT_STATIONS.map.
Consider screenshotting from FP camera looking +z (behind stations) for the canonical hero shot.
Hero cube glow visible but small — designer F-2 (boost hero brightness) may need re-evaluation in deployed view.
